garden_hero_tagline: The Garden Hotel is Scanno's an historic landmark property: a building overlooking the medieval village centre, set within the natural landscape of the Sagittario Valley. Today it represents a concrete opportunity for those wishing to invest in tourism, residential development or the socio-health sector in one of Italy's most captivating villages.
garden_desc: A versatile hospitality property in the heart of Scanno, nestled in the soul of Abruzzo.
garden_intro_copy: A hospitality complex that combines volume, visibility and flexibility of use: suitable for renewed hospitality, residential or socio-health scenarios, with a direct relationship to the landscape and village life.
garden_location: From the historic center of Scanno
garden_overview_title: Sixty years of history, an unprecedented opportunity
garden_text1:
The Garden Hotel represents a unique opportunity in the heart of Abruzzo: a historic accommodation facility, well-distributed and ready to be relaunched or transformed according to new needs.



Thanks to its versatility, the structure lends itself to numerous alternative uses: tourist residence, retirement home for self-sufficient elderly people, health residence, wellness center or SPA, apartment complex for sale or rent.



Born as a three-star hotel in 1964, it has been the subject of numerous expansions and modernizations until it achieved the four-star classification in 1996, remaining the only hotel of this category in Scanno.



The structure was managed continuously until a few years ago and is currently in good general condition, although it requires system updates and partial but not structural renovation work.

garden_overview_highlights.title: Multiple vocations
garden_overview_highlights.description: Hotel, residence, assisted living, SPA or apartments: the layout supports several enhancement scenarios.

garden_overview_highlights.title: Already articulated distribution
garden_overview_highlights.description: Rooms, common areas, restaurant, kitchen and technical spaces create a rare foundation for redevelopment.

garden_overview_highlights.title: A dialogue with the landscape
garden_overview_highlights.description: The Garden Hotel opens onto Scanno's historic centre and the Apennine peaks with direct views and generous outlooks onto a landscape of rare beauty.

garden_overview_image_caption_value: Open views over the village and the mountains of Scanno

garden_rooms.title: Hospitality
garden_rooms.description: The accommodation capacity reaches up to 90 beds, distributed in single, double, triple, quadruple rooms and suites/apartments, for a total of 36 rooms. All the furnishings in the rooms are handcrafted in solid walnut wood.

garden_spaces.title: Common spaces
garden_spaces.description: The Garden Hotel also has large common areas: reception, hall, bar, restaurant rooms, breakfast room, games and entertainment rooms.

garden_restaurant.title: Restaurant
garden_restaurant.description: The dining area can accommodate up to 300 people between the restaurant, porch and atrium. The hotel also has a large professional kitchen.

garden_service.title: Service rooms
garden_service.description: The hotel has some service rooms and technical rooms, including industrial laundry, boiler room, warehouse and changing rooms.

garden_parking.title: Parking
garden_parking.description: Immediately outside the hotel there is also a private car park with 25-30 spaces, also accessible to coaches.

garden_outdoor.title: Outdoor spaces
garden_outdoor.description: Among the outdoor spaces, there is a panoramic garden on two levels, terraces, balconies, and a small terrace/solarium.

garden_position.title: Strategic position
garden_position.description: The property is located in a strategic position, adjacent to the public gardens and well connected to the main services, schools and public transport.

garden_surroundings.title: In the surroundings
garden_surroundings.description: The historic center can be reached on foot in a few minutes, while Lake Scanno is just over 2 km away.

garden_kitchen_zone1.title: Kitchen Areas
garden_kitchen_zone1.description: The kitchen is divided into various rooms, for a total of 150 m².

garden_kitchen_zone2.title: Cooking Area
items: single-plate stove with two ovens fueled by diesel
two extractor hoods that cover all the hobs with an effective extraction system complete with motor and exhaust flue on the roof

garden_kitchen_zone3.title: Refrigeration
garden_kitchen_zone3.description: The kitchen is also equipped with:
items: an additional cold room for fine wines
two column refrigerators for bottles in the restaurant room
an ice cream display case in the restaurant room

garden_numbers_desc: Some of the features that make the hotel an important opportunity.
garden_cards_helper: Click on one section to view more information
garden_features_desc: The property includes differentiated and clearly identifiable spaces. Select a section to see how it looks and what role it could play in the relaunch strategy.
garden_gallery_title: A closer view of the property
garden_gallery_desc: From common areas to bedrooms, the gallery brings visitors inside the concrete character of the building.
garden_potential_description: The complex shape and multiple levels also allow for a different use of the building. The structure can be easily transformed for different internal distributions. Take a look at the possible redevelopments of the Garden Hotel.

garden_potential_items.title: Expansion
garden_potential_items.content: The General Regulatory Plan (PGR) allows for the possibility of expanding the existing gross usable area by 10%.

garden_potential_items.title: Socio-health use
garden_potential_items.content: The Garden Hotel is very suitable due to its position, layout and territorial location to be transformed into a tourist residence for the elderly, a rest home for self-sufficient people or a nursing home.

garden_potential_items.title: Residential use
garden_potential_items.content: The structure could also be used for residential purposes. In particular, it could be used for civilian housing and appurtenances. The apartments that can be built are about 25. Alternatively, a residence could be created for apartments for rent or sale.

garden_potential_items.title: Tourist-receptive use
garden_potential_items.content: The current tourist-receptive use is maintainable and could also be expanded or modified. The presence of many rooms used and necessary in the past for banquets could result in an increase in accommodation, transforming the rooms into bedrooms or creating services such as gyms, digital entertainment rooms, wellness centers/SPA.

garden_landscape_title: Scanno and its surroundings: nature, tradition and wonder
garden_landscape_description: Scanno, nestled in the mountains of Abruzzo, is a village full of charm, history and natural beauty. From the crystalline waters of its lake to the medieval alleys, every corner tells a story. Discover the unmissable attractions that make this pearl of the Sagittario Valley unique.

garden_landscape_items.title: Scanno Lake
garden_landscape_items.content: Scanno Lake is the largest natural lake in Abruzzo, famous for its heart shape and crystalline waters. It is an ideal place for walks, escursions and sports activities.

garden_landscape_items.title: Historical Center of Scanno
garden_landscape_items.content: The historic center of Scanno is a labyrinth of narrow streets and stone houses, with historic churches, ancient arches and artisan workshops. A journey through time among postcard views and traditions that still live today.

garden_landscape_items.title: Sentiero del Cuore
garden_landscape_items.content: The Sentiero del Cuore is a panoramic path that leads to the panoramic point from which you can see the heart-shaped Lake Scanno. A unique experience for trekking and photography lovers.

garden_landscape_items.title: San Domenico Lake - Villalago
garden_landscape_items.content: A few kilometers from Scanno, nestled between the mountains and crossed by a suggestive stone bridge, San Domenico Lake is a place of peace and timeless beauty. Its emerald green waters reflect the surrounding nature and the ancient Hermitage of San Domenico, built in a cave, offers a postcard-like setting. Ideal for a relaxing trip, a picnic, or simply to breathe in the quiet of the valley.

garden_landscape_items.title: Abruzzo, Lazio and Molise National Park
garden_landscape_items.content: Scanno is located in the heart of one of the oldest and most fascinating natural parks in Italy. The Abruzzo, Lazio and Molise National Park is a paradise of biodiversity, with an extraordinary variety of protected flora and fauna, including the Marsican brown bear. Its trails offer breathtaking views, centuries-old woods, lakes and refuges immersed in nature. An unmissable experience for hikers, photographers and lovers of the outdoors.

garden_landscape_items.title: Traditions and Gastronomy
garden_landscape_items.content: Scanno is a village that jealously preserves its ancient traditions. The traditional female costume, rich in embroidery and symbolism, is among the most fascinating in Abruzzo and is still worn on special occasions. As for gastronomy, between cheeses, mountain honey and traditional sweets, every flavor tells the story of the territory.

home_hero_tagline: With over thirty years of practice across the Abruzzo territory, our studio offers integrated technical consultancy: from architectural design to cadastral practices, from property appraisals to building amnesties. A trusted point of reference for private clients, businesses and public bodies.
home_studio_title: From design to cadastre: integrated technical expertise
home_studio_desc: With over thirty years of practice, the Technical Studio of Geom. Spallone Pierfrancesco supports private clients, businesses and public bodies across all technical, construction and real estate matters. From architectural and structural design to construction management, from property valuations to cadastral practices, from building amnesties to regulatory filings, from energy certifications to planning permits (SCIA, DIA): a single professional expertise for every need.
home_studio_service1_desc: Architectural and civil engineering design, with complete management of works from concept to testing.
home_studio_service2_desc: Real estate valuations, technical and cadastral appraisals for sales, successions and disputes.
home_studio_service3_desc: Cadastral variations, amnesties, building permits, energy certifications and compliance.
home_hotel_desc: A historic hospitality structure in the heart of Abruzzo. 2,600 m² over five floors, ready to be relaunched or transformed for new uses.
home_contacts_desc: Contact us for any information about the Garden Hotel or for a personalized technical consultation. We will reply as soon as possible.
garden_cta_desc: Contact us for detailed information, floor plans and complete technical documentation.
